title: Hody Attacks Shirahoshi
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is hody attacks shirahoshi.
scene: The scene follows hody attacks shirahoshi, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe you'll hold up longer than the rest of these spineless idiots.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I may be a squid, but I am also a fish-man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, skeleton, you might wanna move!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh man, he's standing right on him...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It must have been his fault...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ehhhhhh?! who in the world are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You may not think much of my headbutt right now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but I assure you, your foot will soon begin to ache intole- rably!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's refusing to admit that he got stepped on!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I apologise for standing on your face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He gave it an attack name!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't need to open up that many holes beneath the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where did that coral- headed dance get to?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kyakky Ahh! You'll never beat me beneath the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The fool... His back is wide open!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Chopper!! Get out here, WOULD YOU?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Be crushed by my mighty strength!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you link up the holes, chopper?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We already fought a burrowing enemy once in Alabasta!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We have experience on our side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why, you filthy coral- headed creature !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll bite that nose of yours clean off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Daruma vs us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us us

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bring it on!! Chopper, back me up, yeah?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it's power you're after, I've got something special up my sleeve!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Look... He's blocking every single attack!!

summary: Hody Attacks Shirahoshi. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
